chain.thought: Explanation: The locomotives with names are those where the name column is not '-'. Rows 27, 28, 29, 31, 32, 33, 34, and 35 have '-', indicating no name. All others (rows 1–26 and 30) have names, totaling 27 locomotives.

judge_thought: Explanation: Count the rows where the "name" column is not "-" (i.e., has an actual name). Rows 1–26 all have names, row 30 also has a name ("australian men's hockey team"), while rows 27–29 and 31–35 have "-". Thus, 26 + 1 = 27 locomotives have names. The Prediction Answer matches this count.
